notes: pip install annotated ScaFFold tree into shared venv, bounded single-proc smoke run, verify trace via MCP utils

attempts.error: dftracer's compiled-in ROCProfiler/HIP interception (librocprofiler-sdk.so.1 linked into dftracer.dftracer.so) breaks torch's HIP/CUDA runtime init (RuntimeError: Error in dlopen: libcaffe2_nvrtc.so) once the native profiler actually loads. Requires STEP 3 dftracer rebuild without ROCProfiler feature.
